# Drift Scenarios

This directory stores drift detection reports generated by the pipeline's drift
stage and the `monitor-drift` CLI command.

## Generated Files

| File | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `drift_report.json` | Pipeline drift stage | Standard drift result (v1.0.0 schema) |
| `drift_report.html` | Pipeline drift stage | Evidently interactive HTML dashboard |

These files are overwritten on each pipeline run. The promotion stage reads the
JSON report from `outputs/drift_result.json` (not from this directory) to
decide whether to block model promotion.

## Monitoring Output

Batch monitoring results from `monitor-drift` are saved separately to
`outputs/drift_monitoring/<model-name>/` as timestamped JSON files, not to this
directory.

## MLflow Artifacts

Both reports are also logged as MLflow artifacts under the pipeline run for
historical tracking. See [docs/drift-detection.md](../docs/drift-detection.md)
for the full drift detection guide.
